rows.label: qev041405_MSG0001
rows.name:
*Cough*... *Cough*... Nun is the Elder
of the Nopon, mo... But nowadays, no
one listens to a word I say, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0002
rows.name:
*Cough*... My physical condition is
not good either... I just want to slip
away and disappear like this, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0003
rows.name:
*Cough*... Stop doing pointless things, mo...
They are not going to launch fireworks for me
anyway, mo. Nobody cares about Nun at all, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0005
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*... Hmph... Nun
cannot believe in anything anymore
except this soft sensation, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0006
rows.name:
Eek! Elder, please stop
that right now, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0004
rows.name:
*Cough* *Cough*... Hmph... Nun does
not believe in anything, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0007
rows.name:
That surprised me so much I thought
my heart would stop, mo. Is this some
elaborate form of harassment, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0009
rows.name:
That warmth was the last remaining
hope for Nun and his short lifespan,
so it is a shame, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041405_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Hm? Am I not worried about my
grandson? I do not care about him,
I just want to feel her up, mo.[ST:wait ]
